sn18.9:1.1:
1
… "What do you think, Rahula, is the earth element … the water element … the heat element … the air element … the space element … the consciousness element permanent or impermanent?"
–"Impermanent, venerable sir." …
sn18.9:2.2:
"Seeing thus, Rahula, the instructed noble disciple experiences revulsion towards the earth element …
… revulsion towards the water element … revulsion towards the heat element
sn18.9:2.3: … revulsion towards the air element … revulsion towards the space element … revulsion towards the consciousness element. Experiencing revulsion, he becomes dispassionate … . He understands: ‘… there is no more for this state of being.’"
